title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 7416 / 53 OG No. 22, 8050 (November 30, 1957

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2015, June 22, 1957 ]

AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (

b

), page eighty-six, group IV, sub-paragraph twenty-eight, for the City of Manila, paragraph

"f,"

section two of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven, is amended to read as follows:

"(b)

Paco Puericulture Center Construction and filling of site

P20,000.00."
